Closed-loop network with credit risk; cheaper but lower-quality earnings
Payment processor at deep discount; reflects business-quality gap to V

growth_picks.analyst_take: Highest-quality compounder in this set: 97.8% gross margins, 60.4% ROE, 51.7% profit margins, $20.8B FCF, and the strongest analyst conviction. Forward P/E 22.7 on 17.1% revenue growth and 35.5% earnings growth is reasonable for a four-party network with structural AI tailwind. Recent momentum confirms the consolidation has resolved upward.
